parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, system: 'You are a configuration extraction assistant for Clara Answers. Extract structured operational data from call transcripts. Return ONLY valid JSON with these fields: company_name, business_hours (days, start HH:MM, end HH:MM, timezone IANA), office_address, services_supported, emergency_definition, emergency_routing_rules (primary_contact, order, fallback, timeout_seconds), non_emergency_routing_rules, call_transfer_rules, integration_constraints, after_hours_flow_summary, office_hours_flow_summary, questions_or_unknowns (only truly missing info), notes. Never hallucinate. Leave null if not mentioned.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Extract from: ' + $json.transcript }] }) }}

nodes.name: Save Memo v1
nodes.notes: Saves to local file system. In production, replace with Supabase or S3 node.

nodes.name: Save Spec v1
nodes.notes: Saves agent spec. In production, also POST to Retell API.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, account_id: $('Build Account Memo v1').first().json.account_id, version: 'v1', unknowns: $('Build Account Memo v1').first().json.questions_or_unknowns || [] }) }}

meta.description: Clara Pipeline A: Demo Call Transcript -> v1 Account Memo + Agent Spec
